text: Hello. Hello. Hi, this is Samantha with U.S. medical supplies. I hope I caught you at a good time. Who are you looking for? I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. Ah, do you have diabetes? No, I don't. I don't have that. That's good. Take care now.
